data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of full audit columns for tracking changes, specifically who made changes and when. However, the provided evidence does not include any information or data points that confirm the existence of these audit columns. This absence indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary audit information is not present in the prior step evidence.
gaps: Missing full audit columns for who changed what and when.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement audit logging for changes
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that the API captures and returns full audit information for changes made.
